data.name: Tipsy
data.story: Tipsy was previously at a golf resort where they offered exotic bird experiences. It was clear that this program was not a good fit for him when he started exhibiting stress-induced feather plucking behavior. This led him to be rehomed to Alveus.
data.mission: He is an ambassador for how the pet trade and habitat loss have affected his parrot species and many others around the world.
